title: Monday App AppFeatureItemView re-use item updates rich text editor
excerpt: Is there a way to embed the rich text editor used in Item/Updates into an app’s AppFeatureItemView? I can’t find a matching component in the design system.

posts.author: ulrich_izymes (Ulrich)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to embed the rich text editor used in Item/Updates into an app’s AppFeatureItemView? I can’t find a matching component in the design system.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @ulrich_izymes and welcome to the community!

Would you be able to please fill this form so our team can take a look into this? Please add as much detail about your case as possible.

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias
